_note: Fix that appears narrow but exploration reveals >4 files, a schema migration, and an API contract change. Used by eval 2 to test scope gate detection (step 6 only).

bug.title: Bug: Settlement payouts missing currency code in multi-currency accounts
bug.body:
## What is broken?

Merchants with multi-currency accounts receive settlement payouts that do not include the currency code, causing reconciliation failures in their accounting systems.

## User impact

All multi-currency merchants — approximately 40 accounts. Finance teams cannot reconcile payouts without the currency identifier.

## Expected behaviour

Every settlement payout record includes a `currency_code` field.

## Actual behaviour

`currency_code` is absent from settlement records and API responses.

schema_changes: settlements table: add currency_code VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL
